name: Region Renamed
description: User renames an existing region on the collection map

template.summary: Renamed region from '{{region.old.name}}' to '{{region.new.name}}' in collection {{collection.id}}

events.collection-map.region-renamed: Renamed region {{region.id}} from '{{region.old.name}}' to '{{region.new.name}}' in collection {{collection.id}}
